grant_title: Longwood Foundation Inc - Annual Giving Program
geographic_restrictions: Delaware and Kennett Square, PA (within a 4-mile radius of Longwood Gardens)
project_area: Nearly all sectors, including education, social services, arts, healthcare, environment, housing, and civic causes. Priority given to proposals that demonstrate growth, strengthening, or improvement of organizational impact.
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated; however, proposals must demonstrate clear measures of success and community impact within the geographic focus area.
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations with a focus on Delaware and the Kennett Square, PA area (within 4 miles of Longwood Gardens). Organizations must demonstrate financial health, strong leadership, measurable outcomes, and the ability to sustain impact post-grant. Religious purposes, events/gala, endowments, individual scholarships, and organizations outside the geographic focus are ineligible. Applicants must wait two years before reapplying if previously declined or approved.
